HIGH.patient_education: Full diabetes self-management education before discharge
HIGH.notes: Patient flagged as HIGH RISK for 30-day readmission. Prioritise care coordination and confirm patient has support at home.

MODERATE.outpatient_review: GP or practice nurse review within 2 weeks
MODERATE.notes: Patient flagged as MODERATE RISK. Ensure discharge letter includes medication changes and monitoring plan.

LOW.glucose_monitoring: Routine HbA1c at next scheduled appointment
LOW.notes: Patient assessed as LOW RISK. Proceed with standard discharge.
